title: An Ordinance enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2025 amounting to Two Million Pesos (Php 2,000,000.00) chargeable against government equity surplus and Seven Million Seven Hundred Fifty-one Thousand Four Hundred Forty-Five Pesos and 68/100 (Php 7,751,445.68) chargeable against the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Current Appropriation - 30% Quick Response Fund.
